description: Generate IDs, QR codes, and hashes, encode values, geolocate IPs, plus gated host diagnostics.
name: io.github.cyanheads/toolkit-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Register the gated toolkit_check_network tool. Off by default — leave off for hosted/shared deployments.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLKIT_ENABLE_NET_DIAGNOSTICS

environmentVariables.description: Register the gated toolkit_check_system tool. Off by default — only meaningful on a local deployment.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLKIT_ENABLE_SYSTEM_INFO

environmentVariables.description: With network diagnostics enabled, permit private/reserved/loopback targets. The second explicit gate; off by default.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLKIT_ALLOW_PRIVATE_NETWORK

environmentVariables.description: IP-geolocation provider id. Default 'ip-api' is the keyless free tier.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLKIT_GEO_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: API key for the geolocation provider, if it requires one. The default ip-api tier is keyless.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLKIT_GEO_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the geolocation provider. Default is the keyless ip-api endpoint.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLKIT_GEO_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Geolocation cache TTL in seconds. Geolocation is stable, so repeats are cached.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLKIT_GEO_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Max geolocation requests per minute before backoff slows. Default 45 matches the ip-api free tier.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLKIT_GEO_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN
